hero.eyebrow: Digital loyalty cards for small businesses
hero.subtitle: LoyalFlow replaces paper loyalty cards with a digital card, QR scanning, and automatic rewards — so every repeat visit is tracked, rewarded, and turned into a habit.
hero.subtitleExtra: No printing, no lost cards, no manual bookkeeping — you see everything your customers earn and redeem live in one dashboard, while marketing, birthday perks, and referrals run automatically in the background.
hero.trust: Free to start · No paperwork · Set up in 5 minutes

stats.srLabel: Key numbers about the LoyalFlow platform

audience.title: Who LoyalFlow is for
audience.subtitle: If you have customers who come back, LoyalFlow helps you keep them — whatever your business.
audience.more: ...and any service business with returning customers.

benefits.title: Why small businesses switch to LoyalFlow
benefits.subtitle: Everything you need to turn occasional customers into regulars — no extra staff or technical skills required.

items.title: Stronger customer loyalty
items.description: Points, stamps, and rewards give customers a reason to come back instead of going to a competitor. Every visit is a step closer to the next reward.

items.title: No more paper cards
items.description: The loyalty card lives on the customer's phone — it can't get lost or torn, and it's always ready to scan in seconds.

items.title: QR scan in seconds
items.description: Staff scan the code, the customer earns points — no waiting at the register and no writing it down by hand.

items.title: Marketing on autopilot
items.description: Birthday discounts, campaigns, and reminders go out automatically, with no extra work from you — while you run your business.

items.title: Real business insight
items.description: A dashboard shows you who your most loyal customers are, how often they return, and which rewards they love most.

items.title: Friend referrals
items.description: Happy customers bring new customers through the built-in referral program — both get rewarded, you get a new regular.

items.title: Birthday rewards
items.description: Automatically send a special gift on a customer's birthday — a small gesture that leaves an impression and drives an extra visit.

items.title: Badges & tiers
items.description: Bronze, silver, gold, platinum — customers compete for status, and you get increasingly engaged regulars.

how.title: How it works
how.subtitle: From sign-up to a customer's first reward — in four steps.

steps.title: Create a free account
steps.description: Register your business and set up a loyalty program — points, stamps, discounts, or VIP tiers, whatever fits you.

steps.title: The customer gets a digital card
steps.description: A card with a QR code arrives instantly, no app download required — it opens right in the phone's browser.

steps.title: Scan the QR on every visit
steps.description: Points and stamps are added automatically, and the customer sees their progress live, right after scanning.

steps.title: The customer returns for a reward
steps.description: You track everything — visits, rewards, and your most loyal customers — in one clear dashboard, with zero paperwork.

cta.title: Ready to turn your customers into regulars?
cta.subtitle: Join the small businesses that replaced paper cards with a digital experience customers love using.

footer.tagline: Digital loyalty cards for small businesses.
footer.madeFor: Made for small businesses, with care.
